scripts.generate:api: openapi-typescript ../openapi/user-service.yaml -o src/api/generated/user.ts && openapi-typescript ../openapi/route-service.yaml -o src/api/generated/route.ts && openapi-typescript ../openapi/trip-service.yaml -o src/api/generated/trip.ts && openapi-typescript ../openapi/booking-service.yaml -o src/api/generated/booking.ts && openapi-typescript ../openapi/payment-service.yaml -o src/api/generated/payment.ts
